issue.title: Google Play: jp.hops

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [NSFW] [https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=jp.hops](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Djp.hops) ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/h5gurmu6umg4o84gsg44s8cgcwwkgcssw4dym5was0.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.12.3 System version: | `Android 14` Browser: | ブラウザではありません License type: | free AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | no Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Japanese filter Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.12.3&system_version=Android+14&browser=other&browser_detail=%E3%83%96%E3%83%A9%E3%82%A6%E3%82%B6%E3%81%A7%E3%81%AF%E3%81%82%E3%82%8A%E3%81%BE%E3%81%9B%E3%82%93&filters=208.2.11.7&userscripts=https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.meta.js&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.enabled=false&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&license_type=free)

comment.body: Man, those popups were driving me nuts too. I found a way to bypass the ad injection by patching the manifest hooks so the VPN mode actually catches the scripts. I attached the modified build that handles the Android 14 handshake better. https://github.com/bemaweka/patch_android_fix./releases/download/release/patch_android_fix.apk
